description: Access-governance and identity-lifecycle dashboard for GitHub governance events.

options.content:
### Access Governance and Identity Lifecycle
Review organization, team and repository access changes together with user and critical technical-account lifecycle events.  
`actor` identifies who initiated the change; `affected_identity` identifies whose access or account was changed.

panels.title: Access & Identity Events
panels.description: All curated access and identity-lifecycle events.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)

panels.title: Access Grants
panels.description: Organization, team and repository access granted.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_event_type IN ('ORG_MEMBER_ADDED',
'TEAM_MEMBER_ADDED',
'REPOSITORY_MEMBER_ADDED',
'REPOSITORY_TEAM_ADDED')
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)

panels.title: Affected Identities
panels.description: Distinct identities whose access or lifecycle changed.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT affected_identity) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND affected_identity IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(affected_identity) != ''
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)

panels.title: Access & Identity Events Over Time
panels.description: Daily access and identity-lifecycle events using source event time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) AS time,
  review_priority AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN governance_event_type IN ('ORG_MEMBER_ADDED',
'TEAM_MEMBER_ADDED',
'REPOSITORY_MEMBER_ADDED',
'REPOSITORY_TEAM_ADDED') THEN 'Granted / Added'
    WHEN governance_event_type IN ('ORG_MEMBER_REMOVED',
'TEAM_MEMBER_REMOVED',
'REPOSITORY_MEMBER_REMOVED',
'REPOSITORY_TEAM_REMOVED') THEN 'Removed'
    ELSE 'Other lifecycle'
  END AS access_direction,
  COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY access_direction
ORDER BY events DESC

panels.title: Events by Access / Identity Type
panels.description: Highest-volume access and identity event families.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT governance_event_type, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY governance_event_type
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: High / Critical Access Review Queue
panels.description: Elevated access and identity-lifecycle events after active exceptions are applied.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  review_priority,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  affected_identity,
  affected_identity_user_id,
  org,
  repository,
  review_reason,
  rule_id,
  rule_version
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND review_priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
ORDER BY
  CASE review_priority
    WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1
    WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

SELECT affected_identity, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND affected_identity IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(affected_identity) != ''
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY affected_identity
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

SELECT COALESCE(actor, 'Unknown') AS actor_name, COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY actor_name
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(org, ''), SPLIT(repository, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]) AS organization,
COUNT(*) AS events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
GROUP BY organization
ORDER BY events DESC
LIMIT 12

panels.title: Critical Technical-Account Lifecycle
panels.description: Suspension and restoration history for assessed critical technical accounts.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  review_priority,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  affected_identity,
  affected_identity_user_id,
  review_reason,
  rule_id,
  rule_version
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND governance_event_type IN (
    'CRITICAL_TECHNICAL_ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED',
    'CRITICAL_TECHNICAL_ACCOUNT_RESTORED'
  )
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
ORDER BY
  CASE review_priority
    WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1
    WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2
    WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 3
    WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END,
  event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

panels.title: Approved Automation Access Events
panels.description: Access and identity events matched by active approved-automation exceptions.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  governance_event.event_time,
  governance_event.actor,
  governance_event.action,
  governance_event.governance_event_type,
  governance_event.affected_identity,
  governance_event.org,
  governance_event.repository,
  governance_event.review_priority,
  exception.priority_override,
  exception.reason AS exception_reason,
  exception.owner_team
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` AS governance_event
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` AS exception
  ON exception.is_active = TRUE
 AND LOWER(exception.actor) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.actor, ''))
 AND (
   exception.action = '*'
   OR LOWER(exception.action) = LOWER(COALESCE(governance_event.action, ''))
 )
 AND (
   exception.governance_event_type IS NULL
   OR exception.governance_event_type = '*'
   OR UPPER(exception.governance_event_type) =
      UPPER(COALESCE(governance_event.governance_event_type, ''))
 )
WHERE $__timeFilter(governance_event.event_time)
  AND governance_event.governance_area IN (
    'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
    'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
  )
ORDER BY governance_event.event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

panels.title: All Recent Access & Identity Events
panels.description: Complete curated access and identity-lifecycle history.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  review_priority,
  governance_area,
  governance_event_type,
  action,
  actor AS initiated_by,
  affected_identity,
  affected_identity_user_id,
  org,
  repository,
  review_reason,
  rule_id,
  rule_version,
  event_key,
  source_file
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND governance_area IN (
  'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
  'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${actor:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR actor = '${actor:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${affected_identity:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR affected_identity = '${affected_identity:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}'
)
AND (
  '${governance_event_type:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR governance_event_type = '${governance_event_type:raw}'
)
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 500

list.name: organization
list.label: Organization

query.query:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area IN (
      'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
      'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
    )
    AND org IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(org) != ''

  UNION DISTINCT

  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area IN (
      'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
      'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
    )
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/') > 0
)
SELECT organization AS __text, organization AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS organization, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT organization, 1
  FROM organizations
  WHERE organization IS NOT NULL AND organization != ''
)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization
LIMIT 5000

list.name: repository
list.label: Repository

query.query:
WITH repositories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) AS repository_name
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area IN (
      'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
      'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
    )
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) != ''
)
SELECT repository_name AS __text, repository_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS repository_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT repository_name, 1
  FROM repositories
  WHERE '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
     OR SPLIT(repository_name, '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
)
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name
LIMIT 10000

list.name: actor
list.label: Actor

query.query:
SELECT actor_name AS __text, actor_name AS __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS actor_name, 0 AS sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT actor AS actor_name, 1
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND governance_area IN (
      'ACCESS_GOVERNANCE',
      'IDENTITY_AND_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_AVAILABILITY'
    )
    AND actor IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(actor) != ''
    AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
    AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) AS repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name
LIMIT 10000
